title: sorghum diplandrum
intro: Sorghum diplandrum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sorghum genus and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa, Asia, and Australia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Sorghum diplandrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and body aches, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Sorghum diplandrum can be used as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
